docs.title: Welcome
docs.text:
Welcome to Heartfire's Cavern, a static site created with mkdocs with the express purpose of providing a central place to find documention and download links for my projects.

If you need to contact me, or just want to know a little about me, please check the "About" page.

If you're looking for some of my projects, you can find them on their appropriate pages under "Projects".

docs.title: About Me
docs.text:
My name is Heartfire, or Daniel, if you prefer.

I have been a Python programmer for nearly a decade, and during that time, i have created many personal-use tools to help me automate repetitive tasks.

I have also programmed a handful of games during that time, with my most recent being a Roguelike named "Underhand".

docs.title: Assortment
docs.text:
A modification for Cataclysm:DDA that adds an assortment of extra things to the game, from extra professions to weapons and other items.

Currently, it only contains a couple of professions themed around certain concepts, but will in the future grow to offer a great variety of other things to discover.

docs.title: About
docs.text:
Underhand is a Turn-Based Roguelike, that aims to deliver a gameplay experience without the common pitfalls present in many modern roguelikes, such as cheap deaths and confusing mechanics.

The objective of Underhand is to descend to the very bottom of the dungeon, claim its hidden treasures and return alive, it will not be easy as enemies get much stronger towards the core due to powerful forces only the most skilled will survive.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• A procedurally generated dungeon
  • Many different types of enemy, each with their own strengths and weaknesses
  • A selection of arms and armor to choose from
  • Gather spells that can Confuse and Immolate your foes
